About: It is about a woman depicted in a seated pose.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Austrian Expressionism.
ConsistsOf: It consists of gouache, watercolor, and black crayon on paper.
CreatedBy: It was created by Egon Schiele.
HasA: It has a limited color palette.
It has an empty background.
It has sharp, edgy lines.
It has a distinct style.
It has a sensual and erotic aesthetic.
It has a provocative pose.
It has carmine-red lips.
It has messy, fiery orange-red hair.
It has a deep green top.
It has underwear and black stockings.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by an ugly, distorted feeling.
It is characterized by an overt, raw, and disturbing sexuality.
It is characterized by blatant eroticism.
It is characterized by twisted human anatomy.
It is characterized by jagged lines.
It is characterized by inflected lines.
It is characterized by a naturalistic approach to the human figure.
It is characterized by a nervous energy.
It is characterized by aggressiveness.
It is characterized by sharp angles.
HeldIn: It was held in the National Gallery Prague.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the work of other artists.
It was influenced by Gustav Klimt.
IsA: It is a gouache, watercolor, and black crayon on paper.
It is a work by Egon Schiele.
It is a piece in the National Gallery Prague.
It is a painting in the National Gallery Prague's Collection of Prints and Drawings.
LocatedIn: It is located in the National Gallery Prague, Czech Republic.
MemberOf: It is a member of the New Art Group.
PartOf: It is part of the Austrian Expressionism movement.
